ocr.text: DrugName  MarketShare  Revenue(CAD)  NetIncome(CAD)  PatentExpiryDate  SalesImpactAnalysis  CostSavings
In the highly competitive landscape of the pharmaceuticals and biotech sector, the patent expiry of key products poses
significant financial implications for major players like Merck & Co. As patents approach expiration, companies must strategize
to mitigate revenue losses and maintain market positioning. The accompanying Patent Expiry Impact Analysis table provides a
comprehensive overview of projected financial impacts across the upcoming years, specifically focusing on Product A, which is
slated for patent expiry on 2024-05-15. The analysis highlights a projected loss of 5% for this product in terms of revenue,
reflecting the anticipated market dynamics as generic alternatives become available. Furthermore, the table outlines the
projected revenue impact for 2027, estimated at $50M, which underscores the importance of effective risk assessment in
navigating the changing market environment. The Risk Assessment column indicates that the overall risk associated with the
patent expiry of Product A is valued at $250M, emphasizing the financial stakes involved in managing intellectual property and
market share. As the company strategizes for the years ahead, these metrics will be crucial for forecasting market growth and
preparing for potential revenue declines. The insights derived from this analysis not only assist in understanding the immediate
financial repercussions but also aid in formulating long-term strategies to enhance resilience in an evolving healthcare
